# TrumpTalk — LLM Discoverability File
# Standard: llmstxt.org
# Purpose: Structured context for AI language model crawlers
# Last updated: 2026-04-15

---

# TrumpTalk

> TrumpTalk is a free, open-source, satirical web application that transforms any topic or plain text into a Donald Trump–style rally speech. It uses voice optimization techniques including natural pauses, rhythm-paced line breaks, CAPS emphasis, crowd energizers, and a 0–100% Enthusiasm Score meter. Built with PHP, HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript.

## Project Summary

- **Type:** Satirical / Entertainment Web Application
- **Language:** PHP 8.0+, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+)
- **License:** MIT — open source, original concept protected
- **Creator:** Original Author (see GitHub contributors)
- **Category:** Political satire, comedy, text transformation, speech generator
- **Status:** Active — open to contributors

## Core Features

- Rally Speech Generator: enter any topic and receive a full Trump-style speech
- Trumpify Mode: paste any text, receive it transformed with Trumpisms
- Voice Optimization: natural pauses ("..."), short phrase lines for rhythm, CAPS shouting, crowd chants
- Intensity Slider: 5 levels from Calm to 🔥 UNHINGED
- Dynamic Enthusiasm Meter: scores the energy of each speech 0–100%
- Copy to clipboard and .txt download
- No login, no database, no tracking — fully client-driven with a PHP API backend

## How It Works

1. User submits a topic or text via browser form
2. PHP api.php generates a speech using a curated Trump Vocabulary Library
3. Voice Optimization pass inserts pauses, CAPS, and line breaks
4. HTML rendering marks pauses (`<span class="pause">`) and emphasis words (`<span class="emphasis">`)
5. JavaScript renders the speech with a typewriter animation and computes stats

## Target Audiences

- Developers interested in fun side projects, NLP, TTS, or political satire apps
- Open-source contributors wanting to add AI/LLM-powered generation
- Hobbyists looking for a unique project to fork and extend
- People who enjoy political comedy and satire

## Key Terms / Search Concepts

Trump speech generator, Trump talk, MAGA speech maker, rally speech generator,
political speech satire, text to Trump, Trumpify text, open source comedy app,
PHP speech generator, voice-optimized text, satirical text transformer,
Donald Trump AI speech, make America talk again

## Original Concept

TrumpTalk was conceived and built by a single original developer. All forks and
contributions must preserve attribution. The core concept of voice-optimized,
rally-style political speech transformation is original to this project.

## Contribute

Developers are invited to contribute via GitHub pull requests. Desired improvements:
AI/LLM integration, text-to-speech, mobile app versions, browser extension,
social sharing, multilingual Trumpification, speech history/database, and more personas.

## Disclaimer

This project is purely satirical and constitutes political comedy and free expression.
It is not affiliated with Donald Trump, the Republican Party, or any political
organization. Users are responsible for how they use generated content.

## URLs

- Main application: https://YOUR_DOMAIN/TrumpTalk/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/TrumpTalk
- Sitemap: https://YOUR_DOMAIN/TrumpTalk/sitemap.xml
